mapper.select: select count(*) from code_node where project_id = #{projectId} and version_id = #{versionId}
mapper.delete: delete from code_edge where project_id = #{projectId} and version_id = #{versionId}
delete from code_node where project_id = #{projectId} and version_id = #{versionId}
mapper.insert: insert into code_node(project_id, version_id, node_type, name, qualified_name, file_path, line_no, metadata_json) values (#{projectId}, #{versionId}, #{nodeType}, #{name}, #{qualifiedName}, #{filePath}, #{lineNo}, #{metadataJson})

insert into code_edge(project_id, version_id, from_node_id, to_node_id, edge_type, metadata_json) values
(#{item.projectId}, #{item.versionId}, #{item.fromNodeId}, #{item.toNodeId}, #{item.edgeType}, #{item.metadataJson})
mapper.select: select metadata_json from code_node where node_type = 'SQL' and id in #{nid} limit 30
select distinct name from code_node where node_type = 'DB_TABLE' and id in #{nid} limit 50
select id, node_type, name, qualified_name, file_path, line_no, metadata_json from code_node where project_id = #{projectId} and version_id = #{versionId} and id = #{nodeId} limit 1

select id, node_type, name, qualified_name, file_path, line_no, metadata_json from code_node where project_id = #{projectId} and version_id = #{versionId} and (qualified_name = #{className} or qualified_name like concat(#{className}, '.%')) and node_type in ('CLASS','METHOD','MAPPER','MAPPER_METHOD') order by case when node_type = 'CLASS' then 0 else 1 end, line_no limit 30
select id, name, qualified_name from code_node where project_id = #{projectId} and version_id = #{versionId} and node_type = 'MAPPER_METHOD'
